Custom Amusement Park Banners for Theme Parks & Attractions

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your theme park or entertainment venue with eye-catching custom amusement park banners. From ride promotions and safety announcements to entrance displays and seasonal attractions, we help you improve visibility and create unforgettable first impressions with professionally designed custom vinyl banners for amusement park installations.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver amusement park banners that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of outdoor banner durability and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive tailor-made amusement park banners. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We provide a wide selection of custom amusement park banner options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design customization in our online designer, and flexible production times to ensure your banner arrives when you need it for your theme park installation. Choose from weather-resistant vinyl materials perfect for outdoor amusement park use, with reinforced finishing options that withstand wind and weather conditions.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special theme park projects, unique installations, and larger quantity orders.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Materials for Outdoor Amusement Park Installation

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your amusement park banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for theme park displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your amusement park signage a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality in outdoor theme park environments.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor amusement park installations and windy conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor theme park displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces in theme park environments.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Amusement Park Banner Durability

Vinyl Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement for outdoor use. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners for theme park installations. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support in amusement park displays.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all amusement park banners to increase durability in outdoor conditions.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for amusement park vinyl banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted for maximum durability.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your amusement park banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner for enhanced durability in theme park environments.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner for outdoor amusement park installations.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided amusement park banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Amusement Park Banner Printing

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you create artwork suitable for amusement park banner printing.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your amusement park banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your theme park project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific amusement park banner project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Amusement Park Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for your amusement park banner orders. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your theme park banners.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight for amusement park openings. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your amusement park banners quickly? The express option is ideal.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for amusement park banner orders. Free and speedy for most custom orders.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush for your theme park installation, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Methods for Custom Amusement Park Banner Orders

Payment

All amusement park banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your amusement park banner order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Amusement Park Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping your amusement park banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large amusement park banner orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping for your amusement park banner delivery, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Amusement Park Banners Online Today

Advertise your amusement park with custom banners from Banners.com! Banners are perfect for promoting your park's operating hours, special attractions, and exciting activities. Use custom banners to showcase mini golf, go-karts, bumper boats, carnival games and rides, batting cages, water parks, laser tag, and all the entertainment your amusement park offers.

Custom amusement park banners also help visitors navigate your facility by identifying ticket booths, concessions, restrooms, information kiosks, and other important locations throughout your theme park. We also offer Yard Signs and Mesh Banners for additional outdoor signage solutions.

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color amusement park banners take your entertainment venue to the next level. At banners.com, we provide all that and more, including quick delivery and outdoor durability perfect for theme park installations.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Amusement Park Banners

What materials work best for outdoor amusement park banners?

For outdoor amusement park installations, we recommend 13 oz or 18 oz vinyl banners for durability, or mesh banners for windy conditions. All materials are weather-resistant and designed to withstand outdoor theme park environments.

Can I get custom sizes for my amusement park banners?

Yes! We offer standard sizes from 1'x1' to 8'x50', and custom sizes are available through our custom quote system for special theme park applications and unique installations.

How long do amusement park banners last outdoors?

Our vinyl banners typically last 2-3 years outdoors when properly installed and maintained. The 18 oz material offers the longest durability for permanent amusement park installations.

What finishing options should I choose for windy theme park locations?

For windy locations, we recommend mesh banners for airflow, or vinyl banners with reinforced hems and corners plus grommets every 2 feet for secure mounting.

Can you help design my amusement park banner?

Absolutely! Our professional design team can create custom artwork for your amusement park banner, or you can choose from our extensive template library and customize online.

What's the fastest production time for amusement park banners?

We offer 1 business day priority production for urgent amusement park needs. Same-day rush production may be available - contact customer service for details.

Do you offer double-sided printing for amusement park banners?

Yes, we can print double-sided amusement park banners up to 150 square feet. Larger double-sided banners require a custom quote.

What file formats do you accept for amusement park banner artwork?

We accept .eps (preferred), .pdf, high-resolution .jpg, and .tiff files. Our design team can help optimize your artwork for the best printing results.
